title: OpenAI 如何打造 AI 原生财务团队：工程师嵌入、ChatGPT、Codex 与工作流智能体
author: OpenAI
content:
OpenAI on OpenAI: Inside the AI-Native Finance Team of the Future

How does a world-leading AI enterprise manage its own financial performance? At OpenAI, the answer is simple: by avoiding legacy enterprise frameworks entirely and constructing an operations infrastructure built on AI-native engineering principles from day one.

Stacie Faggioli, Business Finance Officer for Applications at OpenAI, details how the firm systematically integrates artificial intelligence across its internal architectures to achieve monumental efficiency gains. By establishing an organizational architecture focused on automation, OpenAI demonstrates how small corporate finance units can drive multi-billion-dollar outcomes with unmatched agility.

The Three Organizing Principles of OpenAI Finance

To manage performance while building the corporate infrastructure of tomorrow, OpenAI's finance division adheres tightly to three central operational philosophies:

  • AI Native by Design: Rather than viewing AI as a standard add-on or a bolt-on accessory to long-standing, legacy processes, the team fundamentally modernizes and recreates entire corporate workflows from the ground up. This philosophy shapes cross-functional collaboration and guides the company to actively design its corporate org chart directly around operational AI agents.
  • Demonstrated Headcount Leverage: A third-party evaluation conducted by PWC confirmed that OpenAI’s corporate finance operation functions effectively with a team size that is approximately 20% the size of its comparable technology peers. The organization acts as concrete validation that businesses can successfully execute complex global operations with highly compact staffing models when equipped with optimized tech infrastructure.
  • Deploy Early and Iterate Fast: Because artificial intelligence algorithms change weekly, waiting for fully finalized, static commercial systems creates operational bottlenecks. OpenAI’s default bias is to deploy workflows immediately and let operational protocols grow organically alongside foundational technology models.

Embedding Engineering in Financial Structures

To maximize real-time system iterations, OpenAI eschews traditional boundaries that separate accounting groups from the corporate information technology division. The finance organization is split into three simple strategic pillars:

  1. Strategic Finance: Capital allocation, private fundraises, and growth forecasting.
  2. Finance Operations: The core transaction engine managing customer billings, vendor payouts, tax compliance, and monthly close schedules.
  3. Enterprise Financial Technology (Fintech): Data platforms and core financial information management ecosystems.

Instead of submitting structured requests to isolated engineering silos, OpenAI embeds technical software engineers directly into the financial technology pillar. These engineers sit side-by-side with finance subject matter experts, driving immediate adjustments and updates to daily working tools.

Individual Productivity Wins: Scaling Capital Raises and Complex Financial Models

OpenAI approaches workflow deployments through two distinct channels: boosting individual workspace output and deploying corporate agents to accelerate wide-scale collective workflows.

The Investor Relations Agent

During historic private equity financing programs, OpenAI successfully closed two massive fundraising actions: $40 billion from the private markets and a subsequent $122 billion financing round. In an ordinary corporate structure, rounds of this magnitude invite an unmanageable wave of diligence inquiries that swamp operational professionals.

To resolve this bottleneck, non-technical finance team members constructed a dedicated Investor Relations agent using ChatGPT. Trained on internal corporate data and styled to deliver the tone of a public-company IR professional, the agent generated detailed, strategically framed, and data-backed responses in minutes. This tool allowed a lean internal team to handle both monumental rounds completely in-house, saving hundreds of millions of dollars in external advisory fees.

Traceable, 10-Minute LBO Models in Excel

By leveraging the ChatGPT for Excel plugin, analytical teams can instantly convert complex external market publications into dynamic tools. In an operational demonstration mimicking a private equity analysis for the take-private of a public target ("Openesk"), Faggioli showed how an analyst can upload an equity research PDF directly into Excel and prompt the system to construct a complex Leveraged Buyout (LBO) model.

Within 10 minutes, the integration builds out full financial projections, computes precise capital layer costs across varying debt and equity tranches, generates comprehensive sources-and-uses models, and provides an investment recommendation. Because the tool directly writes formulas into the spreadsheet cells rather than outputting flat data, the entire workbook remains auditable and ready for immediate sensitivity scenario tests.

Leveraging Codeex for Executive Analytics and Field Intelligence

By deploying Codeex, OpenAI equips non-technical staff with the functional power of software engineering, allowing automated compilation of interactive frontend data interfaces.

+-------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                    OpenAI Codeex Analytics Use Cases                    |
+-----------------------------------+-------------------------------------+
| Dashboard Application             | Core Business Data Impact           |
+-----------------------------------+-------------------------------------+
| Marketing Spend Optimization      | Aggregates highly detailed agency   | 
|                                   | inputs across keyword levels and    | 
|                                   | regions to instantly identify asset | 
|                                   | saturation; enables weekly spend    | 
|                                   | rebalancing to maximize ROI.        | 
+-----------------------------------+-------------------------------------+
| Real-Time Field Sales Insights    | Scans Gong audio transcripts and    | 
|                                   | business emails to trace customer   | 
|                                   | interaction rates for newly         | 
|                                   | launched applications, bypassing    | 
|                                   | manual CRM compliance logs.         | 
+-----------------------------------+-------------------------------------+
| Executive Board Presentations     | Reconciles raw hardware telemetry   | 
|                                   | metrics across active GPU variations| 
|                                   | and overlays complex accounting     | 
|                                   | rules to yield precise margin data. | 
+-----------------------------------+-------------------------------------+

Note on Quality Assurance: While Codeex reduces the work needed to build monthly compute margin slides from several days down to a few hours, OpenAI does not send these dashboards to executive leadership blind. The internal team runs specialized data evaluation tests (evals) to stress-test the math and guarantee absolute alignment with accounting guidelines.

Enterprise Automation: Organization-Level Workflow Agents

At the corporate organizational level, automated AI agents integrate directly across disparate internal software platforms to handle repetitive, high-volume tasks:

  • Procurement Agent: Automatically answers internal travel, expense policy, and budget parameters, successfully deflecting 60% of inbound employee requests without human intervention.
  • Credit Check Agent: Analyzes prospective commercial enterprise accounts in minutes to construct generalized risk metrics, instantly appending scores into the sales CRM to help field reps evaluate target clients safely.
  • Contract Review Agent: Ingests massive enterprise client agreements in bulk to identify non-standard language. This system flag items that could alter legal revenue recognition metrics specified by GAAP ASC 606 standards, ensuring accounting teams close financial books on schedule without needing to scale headcount linearly alongside growing transaction volumes.
  • Vendor Risk Agent: Automatically researches compliance details to compile risk scorecards, embedding individual vendor threat assessments directly into internal corporate procurement applications for rapid approval processing.

Fostering an AI-Native Mindset

True structural leverage stems from a core behavioral shift: transforming how personnel approach business obstacles. OpenAI’s workforce operates with an AI-first conditioning, asking how technology models can streamline any given project before spending hours on manual creation.

Crucially, leadership notes that none of these highly customized, high-ROI applications originated from top-down executive directives. True optimization occurs when access is completely democratized—putting advanced, accessible programming tools like Codeex directly into the hands of the front-line operations specialists who live inside the company's daily datasets.
aiSummary: OpenAI 财务负责人 Stacie Faggioli 介绍，公司如何把工程师、ChatGPT、Excel 智能体、Codex 仪表盘和工作流智能体嵌入财务流程，用更精简的团队运营 AI 原生财务组织。
oneSentenceSummary: OpenAI 财务负责人 Stacie Faggioli 介绍，公司如何把工程师、ChatGPT、Excel 智能体、Codex 仪表盘和工作流智能体嵌入财务流程，用更精简的团队运营 AI 原生财务组织。
summary: Stacie Faggioli 从 OpenAI 内部视角展示了公司如何围绕 AI 原生工作流建设未来的财务团队。她强调三条运营原则：重新设计流程，而不是把 AI 贴到旧流程上；用实际结果证明人效杠杆；尽早上线并快速迭代。随后她拆解了多类具体实践，包括用于大型融资尽调的投资者关系智能体、能生成可追溯 LBO 模型的 ChatGPT for Excel、用于营销 ROI 和销售情报的 Codex 仪表盘、算力毛利演示材料自动化，以及面向采购、信用检查、合同审查和供应商风险的组织级智能体。最有价值的部分，是内部运营细节、量化案例和组织经验放在一起说明：真正持久的杠杆，来自把 AI 工具交给最贴近数据和流程的一线财务人员。

mainPoints.point: AI 原生财务的起点，是围绕智能体重新设计工作流，而不是在旧流程上叠加 AI
mainPoints.explanation: Faggioli 将 OpenAI 财务描述为从一开始就围绕 AI 构建的组织：流程设计、最佳实践扩散、与业务方协作，甚至组织架构规划，都把智能体作为基础能力来考虑。

mainPoints.point: 把工程师嵌入财务团队，可以缩短业务知识与工具迭代之间的距离
mainPoints.explanation: OpenAI 没有把需求排进遥远的 IT 队列，而是让工程师进入企业金融科技支柱，与财务专家并肩工作，使工具能随着日常运营中的真实问题持续演进。

mainPoints.point: 最有说服力的案例，把自动化直接连接到业务结果，而不是停留在抽象的效率叙事
mainPoints.explanation: 投资者关系智能体、营销 ROI 仪表盘、销售情报仪表盘和算力毛利工作流，都分别对应融资、预算重新分配、销售管线可见性和高管汇报等实际结果。

mainPoints.point: OpenAI 将质量控制纳入自动化财务流程，尤其重视高管材料和会计敏感输出
mainPoints.explanation: 算力毛利案例明确说明，人仍然会审核数据并创建 eval；合同审查智能体也会标记影响 GAAP ASC 606 下收入确认的非标准条款。

mainPoints.point: 更大的管理启示是让一线人员获得工具能力，而不是只靠高层自上而下想方案
mainPoints.explanation: Faggioli 强调，最有用的想法来自最接近问题、数据和系统的人；因此，采用文化与底层 AI 工具本身同样重要。

keyQuotes: 我们发现，财务团队规模大约只有可比科技同行的 20%
我们就是现实证明：只要技术和工具得当，确实可以用更少的人做更多事
在财务团队里，我们选择把工程师直接嵌入财务，让他们坐在金融科技支柱中
它把编码和软件工程的能力交到了像我这样的非技术人员手中
我的想法数量是零；你必须把工具交到最接近问题的人手里
